dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal identifies failed upside breakout in range-bound market. Entry conditions: (1) Close breaks above Donchian upper (upside breakout attempt), (2) Price corrects/loiters below prior high (failed follow-through). Exit: Price reaches opposite boundary (lower Donchian). Stop loss set conservatively at 2% given range-bound nature. Hold period limited to 5 days as trapped players typically capitulate quickly.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal identifies failed upside breakout in range-bound market. Entry conditions: (1) Close breaks above Donchian upper (upside breakout attempt), (2) Price corrects/loiters below prior high (failed follow-through). Exit: Price reaches opposite boundary (lower Donchian). Stop loss set conservatively at 2% given range-bound nature. Hold period limited to 5 days as trapped players typically capitulate quickly.

source_rule_text: When an upside breakout fails to see follow-through and price corrects back to the range, trapped long players will dump holdings causing price to fall and potentially reach the opposite boundary of the range.
